title: auto-launch brainstorm tunnel in Feature path
description:
## Summary
- Replaces the single brainstorming step in the Feature path with a two-part pre-launch block (Schritt 1a/1b)
- Schritt 1a automatically patches `helper.js` for `wss://`, starts the brainstorm server, publishes the tunnel via `task brainstorm:publish`, and directs the user to `https://brainstorm.mentolder.de`
- Schritt 1b invokes `superpowers:brainstorming` with an override context injected immediately after, preventing double-start and ensuring only the public URL is shown (never `localhost`)
- Reframes the "Visual Companion" section as a troubleshooting/manual appendix

## Test Plan
- [x] Skill file verified: Feature path shows steps 1–11 in order, no gaps
- [x] No localhost URLs exposed in Feature path steps
- [x] `superpowers-helper-patch.sh` referenced in pre-launch block
- [x] All subsections (Setup einmalig, Pro Session, Diagnose) intact in appendix
- [x] Only `.claude/skills/dev-flow/SKILL.md` modified — no deploy needed
